    {
      "deviceKey": "ThingStructureAdvancedPackagingMachine",
      "title": "Advanced Packaging Machine",
      "logicDescriptions": {
        "Power": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Returns 1 if device has power, 0 otherwise."
        },
        "Open": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Whether device import/export slots are open (1) or closed (0)."
        },
        "Error": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Returns 1 if device has an error condition (invalid recipe, missing ingredients, etc.), 0 otherwise."
        },
        "Activate": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Activates device to begin current recipe when set to 1. Read returns current activation state."
        },
        "Lock": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "When set to 1, locks the current recipe preventing changes. 0 unlocks."
        },
        "Reagents": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Total quantity of reagents currently in device."
        },
        "On": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Device on/off state. 1 = on, 0 = off."
        },
        "RequiredPower": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ W",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Power draw in watts when device is operating."
        },
        "RecipeHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Hash of currently selected recipe. Write to change recipe."
        },
        "CompletionRatio": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Progress ratio of current fabrication (0 = not started, 1 = complete)."
        },
        "ClearMemory": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Write",
          "description": "Write 1 to clear device memory and accumulated reagents."
        },
        "ExportCount": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0+",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Number of items in export slot."
        },
        "ImportCount": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0+",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Number of items in import slot."
        },
        "PrefabHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Device type hash (unique identifier for this device type)."
        },
        "ReferenceId": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "Unique",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Unique reference ID for this specific device instance."
        },
        "NameHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Hash of custom name set for this device."
        },
        "StackSize": {
          "dataType": "Integer",
          "range": "0+",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Stack size of currently selected recipe output."
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "deviceKey": "ThingStructureLogicPidController",
      "title": "PID Controller",
      "logicDescriptions": {
        "Power": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Returns 1 if device has power, 0 otherwise."
        },
        "Error": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Returns 1 if PID controller has an error condition, 0 otherwise."
        },
        "Setting": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "Any",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Current PID controller output value calculated from control loop."
        },
        "Maximum": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "Any",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Maximum output limit for PID controller."
        },
        "On": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "PID controller on/off state. 1 = on, 0 = off."
        },
        "RequiredPower": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "0+ W",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Power draw in watts when device is operating."
        },
        "PrefabHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Device type hash (unique identifier for this device type)."
        },
        "ReferenceId": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "Unique",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Unique reference ID for this specific device instance."
        },
        "NameHash": {
          "dataType": "Hash",
          "range": "CRC32",
          "access": "Read",
          "description": "Hash of custom name set for this device."
        },
        "ProportionalGain": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "Any",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Proportional gain (Kp) coefficient for PID controller."
        },
        "IntegralGain": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "Any",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Integral gain (Ki) coefficient for PID controller."
        },
        "DerivativeGain": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "Any",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Derivative gain (Kd) coefficient for PID controller."
        },
        "Minimum": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "Any",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Minimum output limit for PID controller."
        },
        "Setpoint": {
          "dataType": "Float",
          "range": "Any",
          "access": "Read Write",
          "description": "Target setpoint value that PID controller tries to achieve."
        },
        "Reset": {
          "dataType": "Boolean",
          "range": "0-1",
          "access": "Write",
          "description": "Write 1 to reset PID controller integral and derivative terms."
        }
      }
    },
